  "findings": [
    "Incorrect flashing tape sequence at the window sill",
    "Reverse-lapping of flashing materials creating a water-trapping detail"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the incorrectly sequenced sill flashing tape",
    "Re-apply flashing tape in a shingle-fashion sequence (sill flashing must lap over the WRB below, or WRB must tuck under the sill flashing)"
  ],
  "rationale": "The flashing tape sequence at the sill is wrong, creating a reverse lap (shingle-fashion violation) where water running down the WRB or window frame can penetrate behind the weather barrier instead of shedding to the exterior. This violates both IRC R703 flashing requirements and manufacturer installation instructions.",
  "references": [
    "IRC R703.4",
    "IRC R703.8",
    "Manufacturer installation instructions for flashing/WRB integration"
  ]
}
}
